# KoalaData

> KoalaData imports aggregate Chrome Web Store CSV reports and turns them into reviewable, shareable analytics dashboards without adding telemetry code to a browser extension.

Canonical site: https://data.koalastuff.net/
Public extension directory: https://data.koalastuff.net/discover
Weekly growth leaderboard: https://data.koalastuff.net/leaderboards
Security model: https://data.koalastuff.net/security
Privacy policy: https://data.koalastuff.net/privacy
Terms of use: https://data.koalastuff.net/terms
Source code: https://github.com/Shik3i/KoalaData

## Core facts

- KoalaData uses aggregate reports exported by extension publishers from the Chrome Web Store statistics dashboard.
- It does not require an SDK, injected tracking script, fingerprinting, or user-level extension telemetry.
- Publishers preview report mappings, dates, aggregation, duplicates, and overlaps before confirming an import.
- Raw CSV files remain private to authorized project members. Public dashboards expose reviewed aggregate metrics.
- Public directory listings and leaderboard participation require administrative approval.
- A verified badge means that an administrator reviewed the listing and supporting evidence. It is not an endorsement or guarantee.
- Approved public profiles use standard dofollow links to the official store page, website, and source repository.
- The application is open source and can be self-hosted with Node.js, SQLite, and Docker.

Detailed product and data semantics: https://data.koalastuff.net/llms-full.txt
